name: flow
description: The DELIVER-stage plugin — the roadmap flow surface and its deterministic MCP backend, living together. /flow pings and reports the roadmap flow MCP (flow-mcp), and /flow-setup walks the one-time approval and verifies the connection. The bundled first-party flow-mcp Ruby server (Ruby >= 3.3.8, standard library only) answers "what's on the roadmap" by local compute (render_roadmap / list_items, ~0 LLM tokens) and carries roadmap items through their lifecycle (post_status, set_wait_go, append_spend, …). Self-contained and standalone-installable: the /flow command and its MCP backend resolve through ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} only, with no dependency on any sibling plugin. Carries the KAIZEN self-improvement covenant.

metadata.note: skills/ and commands/ are auto-discovered from the plugin root. Ships the first-party flow-mcp MCP server (.mcp.json) and its onboarding/liveness SessionStart hooks (hooks/hooks.json).
